There was once a kingdom of such formidable wealth and high property values
that its stalwart inhabitants overdeveloped it right into a real estate crisis.

Translations.13112: Never count out old Cornelius, though. I can smell the winds of change blowing this way, and they smell GOOD!
Translations.13113: Oh hello there stranger! Welcome to Cornelius Richling's Premium Talent Management & Real Estate Emporium! I am Cornelius, owner, founder, chief officer and sole employee! Let me guess: you've come to Opulencia in search of fame, fortune, respect and recognition, am I right?
Translations.13114: Your silence is all the answer I need, compadre! I'll be the brains, and you'll be the braw....action hero!
Translations.13115: Now, buddy, there's a few small formalities we have to get out of the way before we can turn you loose upon this kingdom! I'm referring, naturally, to the small issue of my one-time retainer, mandatory signing fee, Opulencia welcome tax and advance exceptional performance bonus! I'd say the cost of the armor and weapons you're carrying should about do the trick!
Translations.13116: Don't worry, pally, there's no better investment than one's own future! Now get out there and show me what you can do!
Translations.13117: My my, look at you! You handled that castle like a real professional castle-handler. They have a word for hunks like you: fierce! Simply fierce.
Translations.13118: Now look, I don't know how to tell you this, but you're looking a little light in the equipment department. I'm gonna have to teach you how to dress yourself, aren't I? Ok, come outside with me.
Translations.13119: Check it out! Opulencia! If you stick around with me, all this could be yours. For now, though, let's focus on getting you dressed.
Translations.13121: We're gonna need to beef up your skillset a little bit before we up the ante on your looting, though.
Translations.14359: "But who could teach me such a skill?", I hear you asking yourself in a desperate panic. Well I'll tell you who. His name starts with a C and rhymes with 'zornelius'!
Translations.14360: This skill is gonna be so useful, YOU should be the one paying ME!!! Right, you are the one paying me, nevermind. Hey, did somebody say "paying me"?
Translations.13122: Great! You're looking ready from where I'm sitting. Come see me now, we have much to discuss.
Translations.13123: Now, I've been shopping your name around town, calling in some favors, pulling some strings, and I have some amazing news: pull off one more successful attack and I just MIGHT be able to score you a castle of your very own.
Translations.14361: There's no need to thank me, really. Your eternal gratitude and contractually-bound exclusivity are all the thanks I need! Ready to enter into the exciting world of prime real estate ownership? Get your butt out there!
Translations.13124: You did it, buddy! Or should I say, "you did it HOMEOWNER"! That's right, a promise from your man Cornelius is cash in the bank! I'm holding in my hands the keys to your very own CASTLE! Enough of my chatter, I'm sure you're dying to break the place in. Let's take a look!
Translations.13125: Welcome to our...I mean YOUR castle! This is it, your fortress, your home, your ticket to immortality!
Translations.14363: Your old buddy Cornelius didn't mess around and get you some fixer-upper, though, no sirree!
Translations.14364: This deluxe starter property already comes with a ton of pre-installed equipment. Let's take the grand tour, shall we?
Translations.13126: This is your CASTLE HEART. It's really important! It's the source of your home's general airborneness, not to mention its main power supplier.
Translations.14362: Upgrading the heart is the first step if you want to improve anything else, and also what makes your castle increase in level!
Translations.13127: Here's your GOLD STORAGE, a personal favorite. This is where you'll store all the shiny loot you collect.
Translations.14365: When you max out your storage capacity, you can upgrade it so it'll hold more.
Translations.13128: This is your LIFEFORCE storage, where you'll keep the juice you need to build things. It's upgradeable too!
Translations.13133: Our next order of business is to make sure that the flow of gold into our? I mean into YOUR pockets never dries up, and there's no better way than to make your own!
Translations.14366: Installing a gold mine is easy as can be, plus it looks cool! Just remember: you'll need to be extra-careful to protect it.
Translations.14367: You wouldn't want an invader to come and steal our, I mean YOUR, hard earned cash, now would you?
Translations.13134: Great job! The money train has left the station!
Translations.13135: Hmm, I think I hear knocking at the front door. You should go and see who it is.
Translations.13136: Prepare your earholes for the following message from my lord and master, the God of Goo, the King of Crud, the right honorable Count Snottingham. His snotulousness has heard of your recent endeavors and would like to offer a warning: Do NOT, under any circumstances, attempt to pillage his most impenetrable fortress! A hero as weak and pathetic as you would never be up to the task.
Translations.13137: Wow, you must really have gotten under his skin, and that's not a very pleasant place to be!
Translations.14368: We?I mean YOU are not gonna take that, are you? If we're gonna go to war against Snottingham, we'd really better prepare.

Translations.15431: Now sir, I?ll tell you, there?s nothing sub-prime about THIS market. These luxurious, sky-high habitats are being snatched up by all the finest people. And you?re better than them, am I right?
Translations.15432: Take a look at these fine specimens. Why not take a tour? I extort...ahem, I EXHORT you to wander around. Remember, you'll be able to customize all you want, later.
